name: focus
description: Use this skill when the user suspects an activity isn't worth their time, feels stuck on something, or wants to know if they should keep doing X or try something else. Also use when the user mentions '80/20,' 'Pareto,' 'is this worth my time,' 'should I keep doing X,' 'not getting results from X,' 'spending too much time on X,' or 'what should I focus on instead.' Delivers a kill/refine/pivot verdict with a concrete weekly action plan.
author: whawkinsiv
summary_zh: 这是一个帮你做取舍的决策工具。当你觉得某件事不值得花时间、陷入僵局或迟迟没结果时，它能帮你判断是该放弃、优化还是换方向，并给出具体的每周行动计划。
